revision.text:
[[ja:伊笠神社]] {{Expand Japanese|伊笠神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Igasa Shrine | native_name = 伊笠神社 | image = Igasa shrine, Tokushima.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Igasa Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.13666666666666|134.24661111111112}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Igasa Shrine'''|伊笠神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11657514|ltq=Q11657514|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 5 ** P155: {{ill|Okanoue Shrine|lt=Okanoue Shrine|ja|岡上神社|qid=Q48758325|1=Okanoue Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q48758503|ltq=Q48758503|qid=Q48758503|1=Kotoshironushi Shrine (Q48758503)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Awa, Tokushima|lt=Awa|ar|أوا (توكوشيما)|azb|آوا، توکوشیما|ca|Awa (ciutat)|ceb|Awa-shi|ce|Ава (гӀала, Япон)|de|Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa, Tokushima|envoyage|Awa|es|Awa (Tokushima)|et|Awa|fa|آوا، توکوشیما|fi|Awa (Tokushima)|fr|Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Awa|hy|Ավա (քաղաք, Ճապոնիա)|id|Awa, Tokushima|it|Awa (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市|ko|아와시|mzn|آوا، توکوشیما|nl|Awa (stad)|pl|Awa (miasto)|pt|Awa (Tokushima)|ro|Awa|ru|Ава (город, Япония)|sv|Awa, Tokushima|tg|Ауа|tl|Awa, Tokushima|tr|Awa (şehir)|tt|Ава (шәһәр, Япония)|uk|Ава (Токусіма)|vi|Awa, Tokushima|war|Awa, Tokushima|zh_classical|阿波市|zh_min_nan|Awa-chhī|zh_yue|阿波|zh|阿波市|zhvoyage|阿波|qid=Q791587|1=Awa, Tokushima}} * {{ill|Q907457|ltq=Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Q4829634|ltq=Q4829634|qid=Q4829634|1=Awa District, Tokushima}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.13666666666666|134.24661111111112}} == image (P18) == * Igasa shrine, Tokushima.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183179 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5480005003177 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Takefutsuno Shrine|lt=Takefutsuno Shrine|qid=Q135041304|1=Takefutsuno Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県阿波市市場町犬墓字白水伊笠山上194', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県阿波市市場町香美', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:伊笠神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758379}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name= Igasa Shrine |Image= [[File:Igasa shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|Igasa Shrine (Awa City)]]
Haiden (worship hall) |Location= {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Awa City|Q791587|qid=Q791587|1=Awa, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ichiba-chō Inuhaka|Q55523676|qid=Q55523676|1=Ichiba-chō Inuhaka}} Aza Shirouzu, Igasa-yamaue 194 |Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity= {{ill|lt=Ame no Oshikumone no Mikoto|Q91088537|qid=Q91088537|lt=Ame no Futakami no Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Oshikumone}} |Shrine rank= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}・former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded= {{ill|lt=1655|Q6975|qid=Q6975|1=1655}} ({{ill|lt=Shōō|Q1145081|qid=Q1145081|1=Jōō (Edo period)}} 3rd year, {{ill|lt=September 13 (lunar calendar)|Q840131|qid=Q840131|lt=September 13|1=September 13 (Lunisolar)}}) |Main hall= |Other name= Igasa Shrine |Annual festival= {{ill|lt=October 16|Q2963|qid=Q2963|1=October 16}} |Rituals= |Map= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Igasa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Igasa Shrine''' (いがさじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Awa City|Q791587|qid=Q791587|1=Awa, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ichiba-chō Inuhaka|Q55523676|qid=Q55523676|1=Ichiba-chō Inuhaka}}. It is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}・{{ill|lt=Takefutsu Shrine|Q48758365|qid=Q48758365|1=Takefutsu Shrine}}. === History === It is enshrined on the summit of {{ill|lt=Mount Igasa|Q60997765|qid=Q60997765|1=Mount Igasa}}, the highest peak of the former {{ill|lt=Ichiba Town (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q5986083|qid=Q5986083|lt=Ichiba Town|1=Ichiba, Tokushima}}. Founded in {{ill|lt=1655|Q6975|qid=Q6975|1=1655}} ({{ill|lt=Shōō|Q1145081|qid=Q1145081|1=Jōō (Edo period)}} 3rd year, {{ill|lt=September 13 (lunar calendar)|Q840131|qid=Q840131|lt=September 13|1=September 13 (Lunisolar)}}). It was later restored in {{ill|lt=1729|Q6952|qid=Q6952|1=1729}} ({{ill|lt=Kyōhō|Q1145048|qid=Q1145048|1=Kyōhō}} 14th year). One theory says that it enshrines a branch of the {{ill|lt=Nitta clan|Q2274150|qid=Q2274150|1=Nitta clan}}. The enshrined deity, Ame no Futakami no Mikoto, is considered another name for {{ill|lt=Ame no Oshikumone no Mikoto|Q91088537|qid=Q91088537|lt=Ame no Murakumo no Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Oshikumone}}, but according to the “Heisei Festival Data” published by {{ill|lt=Association of Shinto Shrines|Q908077|qid=Q908077|1=Association of Shinto Shrines}}, it is enshrined only at Igasa Shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Ame no Oshikumone no Mikoto|Q91088537|qid=Q91088537|lt=Ame no Futakami no Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Oshikumone}} === Access === * From the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216|qid=Q11490216|1=Tokushima Expressway}} “{{ill|lt=Donari Interchange|Q10927770|qid=Q10927770|1=Donari interchange}},” via {{ill|lt=National Route 318|Q6157220|qid=Q6157220|1=Japan National Route 318}} and {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefectural Route 139 Funato–Kirihata–Kamiita Line|Q11490019|qid=Q11490019|1=Tokushima Prefectural Road Route 139}}. === References === * 『{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Japan Place Name Dictionary|Q4093011|qid=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|qid=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Igasa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Igasa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:阿波市の歴史]] [[Category:阿波市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]]
